summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Live Demo feature. All major functionality working correctly including real-time market simulation, algorithm thinking panel, controls, and data displays.

integration_issues.issue: Close button (X) is visible and functional but difficult to target with automated selectors
integration_issues.note: Visual confirmation shows button works, just automation selector issue

passed_tests: View Live Demo button visible and clickable in hero section
Demo modal opens correctly when button clicked
XAUUSD price chart displays with live price data (2619.40 → 2489.60 → 2655.73 → 2633.43)
Play/Pause button toggles between RUNNING and PAUSED states
All 4 speed controls (1x, 2x, 5x, 10x) functional and highlight when selected
Algorithm Thinking panel generates real-time decision logs (12+ thought bubbles)
All 5 indicator cards display correctly (RSI, EMA 200, Support, Resistance, Spread)
Session Stats panel shows all metrics (Balance: $10000.00, Total Trades: 0, Win Rate: 0%, Session P&L: +$0.00)
Price chart renders with gold line and support/resistance levels
Real-time market simulation generates realistic XAUUSD price movements
